'''wajuku''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feathertail|feathertail]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-j-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feathertail|feathertail]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| wajuku
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæjikith|wæjikith]] || [[word:wæjikij|wæjikij]] || [[word:wæjikish|wæjikish]] || [[word:wæjiki|wæjiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wajujukuth|wajujukuth]] || [[word:wajujukuj|wajujukuj]] || [[word:wajujukush|wajujukush]] || [[word:wajujuku|wajujuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wajukuth|wajukuth]] || [[word:wajukuj|wajukuj]] || [[word:wajukush|wajukush]] || [[word:wajuku|wajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wajufkuth|wajufkuth]] || [[word:wajufkuj|wajufkuj]] || [[word:wajufkush|wajufkush]] || [[word:wajufkuf|wajufkuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wajukuthu|wajukuthu]] || [[word:wajukuju|wajukuju]] || [[word:wajukushu|wajukushu]] || [[word:wajukuku|wajukuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wajukuth|wajukuth]] || [[word:wajukuj|wajukuj]] || [[word:wajukush|wajukush]] || [[word:wajuku|wajuku]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wajukuthul|wajukuthul]] || [[word:wajukujul|wajukujul]] || [[word:wajukushul|wajukushul]] || [[word:wajukukul|wajukukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wajukuthuthu|wajukuthuthu]] || [[word:wajukujuju|wajukujuju]] || [[word:wajukushushu|wajukushushu]] || [[word:wajukuku|wajukuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wajukuthun|wajukuthun]] || [[word:wajukujun|wajukujun]] || [[word:wajukushun|wajukushun]] || [[word:wajukukun|wajukukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wajukuthuoro|wajukuthuoro]] || [[word:wajukujuoro|wajukujuoro]] || [[word:wajukushuoro|wajukushuoro]] || [[word:wajukukuoro|wajukukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
